name: Domain Trust Discovery Detected
description: Detects the use of command-line tools (dsquery.exe, nltest.exe) to gather information about domain trust relationships. Adversaries may use this information to identify potential pathways for lateral movement and privilege escalation.

prompts.prompt: Domain trust discovery activity detected using command-line tools. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Parent Process Name** {parent_process_name}, **Command** {command}. Investigate this activity to determine if it is a legitimate administrative action or an adversary attempting to map your domain trust relationships.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (e.g., 1).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process (e.g., dsquery.exe, nltest.exe).

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The parent process that launched dsquery.exe or nltest.exe.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line used, indicating domain trust discovery.
